role: document parsing service for the RAG ingestion pipeline

integrationMode.v1: sync upload or URL parse used by Java DocParserClient
integrationMode.v2: async task API for long-running OCR/layout jobs
integrationMode.v3: multi-instance task API backed by Redis/RabbitMQ

response.content: plain text content assembled from parsed chunks

routes.name: asyncDeepParse
routes.contentType: multipart/form-data or application/json in multi-instance app

routes.name: asyncStatus
routes.contentType: multipart/form-data or application/json in multi-instance app

boundaries: Python service owns file parsing, OCR, layout analysis, table/image extraction and parser runtime dependencies.
Java backend owns knowledge-base metadata, upload lifecycle, chunk persistence, embedding, retrieval and chat.
Java must call doc-parser over HTTP; do not embed Python parser dependencies into the Spring Boot backend.
